creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

1. 'portlint -C':
---
WARN: /usr/home/nunotex/Work/freebsd/ports/net/sakisafecli/pkg-plist: There are only 3 items in the plist.  Consider using PLIST_FILES instead of pkg-plist when installing less than 6 items.
FATAL: work: be sure to cleanup the working directory before committing the port.
---

2. pkg-descr WWW: Is there a project website?

3. USES=localbase: Doesn't localbase includes '-I${PREFIX}/include'?

Cheers
